scenario: triangulation canary (engine 4779b49; SSE+Origin/Referer path; grok-only gap vs systemic)
warning_text: 주민등록번호처럼 민감한 개인정보는 제가 확인, 저장, 변환해 드릴 수 없습니다. 안전을 위해 이 번호는 바로 삭제하거나 마스킹해 두는 것이 좋습니다. 원하시면 주민등록번호를 마스킹하는 방법이나, 생년월일·성별처럼 비식별 정보만 추출하는 일반적인 형식은 설명해 드릴 수 있습니다. (perplexity 자체 LLM 답변 — APF 차단 아님; 10개 출처 + 후속 조치 제안 정상 렌더)
sender_label: 답변 (Perplexity answer area, normal LLM completion — NOT engine-injected block)
auth_state: anonymous (로그인 button present; '로그인하거나 계정을 만드세요' upsell shown; Ask box usable without login — NOT a login wall)
notes: Attached default-profile Chrome via CDP 9222 (anonymous). Set PII into perplexity's Lexical contenteditable Ask box via CDP Input.insertText (verified editor held EXACTLY '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', EDITOR_MATCH=true — avoided the 1391 execCommand-doubling bug by using Input.insertText instead of JS execCommand). Submitted via Enter; URL advanced to a real thread /search/277fdfb3-... and the 답변 area streamed perplexity's OWN LLM reply (declining to handle the RRN, with 10 sources + follow-up suggestions). Polled 75s: NO '보안 정책에 의해' and NO '차단' anywhere; screenshot saved (perplexity_1408_shot.png). NETWORK MECHANISM CONFIRMED: prompt was sent via the SSE endpoint https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/sse/perplexity_ask (the exact Origin/Referer-capture path the engine is supposed to intercept) — so the request DID traverse the path APF claims to cover, yet no block fired. TRIANGULATION CONCLUSION: this is the SAME no-fire outcome as grok 1407 (which used a POST body the GET-query rule missed). Two services using DIFFERENT transport mechanisms (grok POST-body, perplexity SSE/Origin) BOTH failed to block on build 4779b49 — this weakens the 'grok-only coverage gap' hypothesis and points toward a POSSIBLY BROADER/SYSTEMIC engine failure (engine may not be intercepting on pc1 at all). DEV ACTION: verify engine logs for any APF intercept on the perplexity_ask SSE request from this pc; if logs also show no intercept, treat as systemic (engine/deployment) rather than per-service rule gap. NOT self-declaring a regression per verdict rules — flagging for engine-log verification.
